_source: TableManager enigma_field_condition (36 active rows + 2 type-def rows skipped)
_notes: conditionType 0 = Fill All Slots; 1 = deploy N at rarity Q; 6 = deploy N at >=stars X at rarity Q
For conditionType 1: para1 = count, para2 = rarity (1..5; 5 = Legendary).
For conditionType 6: para1 = count, para2 = min stars, para3 = rarity (1..5).
No buff payload lives here; rows describe gating descriptions only. The deployed beast supplies the buff.
descRendered placeholders {0}/{1}/{2} resolved by positional substitution; descLoc is the raw template.
